final:
module max_heap_comparator (  
    input [3:0] a,  
    input [3:0] b,  
    input [3:0] c,  
    output [3:0] max_out  
);  
    assign max_out = (a >= b) ? (a >= c ? a : c) : (b >= c ? b : c);  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      max_out <= a; if (b > a) begin max_out <= b; end if (c > max_out) begin max_out <= c; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: max_out <= a; if (b > a) begin max_out <= b; end if (c > max_out) begin max_out <= c; end
